title: AI Agents: How Do We Take Back Control? | Trailer
summary: A documentary hosted by Alex Kantrowitz examining the control gap in AI agent deployment, with research showing 80% of organizations deploy agents but only 10% feel in control. Features interviews with industry leaders from MIT, Alibaba, Michelin, and the White House on governance and accountability challenges.
writeup: This trailer previews a documentary directed by Alex Kantrowitz on the gap between how AI agents get deployed and how organizations actually control them, drawing on interviews with tech leaders and researchers. It matters because agent autonomy is outpacing governance and accountability inside companies. Independent research covering 750 CIOs and CTOs found that only 1 in 3 production AI agents run with zero human oversight, and just 7% of organizations have formal accountability for agent failures.
